mapper.sql: select a.id, a.serial_number, d.plan_number, a.job_id, b.job_name, a.quantity, a.material_id, e.material_Name, e.material_model, e.material_specifications, e.material_unit, a.inspection_id, f.check_item, f.up_limit, f.lower_limit, a.samples_number, a.inspection_value, a.inspection_results, a.check_user_id, g.user_name as check_user_name, a.inspector_time, a.remark from mes_production_sampling a
mapper.select:
left join mes_job_assembly b on a.job_id = b.id left join mes_planned_production c on b.planned_production_id = c.id left join mes_production_plan d on c.production_plan_id = d.id left join wms_material e on a.material_id = e.id left join mes_inspection_standards f on a.inspection_id = f.id left join sys_user g on a.check_user_id = g.user_id
and serial_number like concat('%', #{serialNumber}, '%') and inspection_value like concat('%', #{inspectionValue}, '%') and inspection_results like concat('%', #{inspectionResults}, '%') and check_user_id like concat('%', #{checkUserId}, '%') and inspector_time like concat('%', #{inspectorTime}, '%') and inspector_time between #{params.beginInspectorTime} and #{params.endInspectorTime}

left join mes_job_assembly b on a.job_id = b.id left join mes_planned_production c on b.planned_production_id = c.id left join mes_production_plan d on c.production_plan_id = d.id left join wms_material e on a.material_id = e.id left join mes_inspection_standards f on a.inspection_id = f.id left join sys_user g on a.check_user_id = g.user_id where a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into mes_production_sampling
serial_number, job_id, material_id, inspection_id, quantity, samples_number, inspection_value, inspection_results, check_user_id, inspector_time, remark,
#{serialNumber}, #{jobId}, #{materialId}, #{inspectionId}, #{quantity}, #{samplesNumber}, #{inspectionValue}, #{inspectionResults}, #{checkUserId}, #{inspectorTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from mes_production_sampling where id in
#{id}
